title: Admin assistant & Project Coordinator
description:
PanelCraft is a licensed house renovation and interior solutions company. We are passionate about transforming spaces and delivering quality projects for our clients. As we continue to grow, we are seeking a dynamic Administrative & Project Coordinator who can keep our operations running smoothly while gaining valuable exposure in the renovation industry.

Key Responsibilities

Project & Operations Support

  • Coordinate scheduling of site measurements, installations, and service works
  • Ensure accurate processing of orders, quotations, and cost documentation
  • Liaise with contractors, suppliers, and internal teams for smooth workflow
  • Support project managers with paperwork and customer updates

Office & Administrative Duties

  • Maintain proper record-keeping, filing (physical & electronic), and scanning
  • Handle reception duties: calls, emails, courier services, and visitor arrangements
  • Manage office & pantry supplies, renovation samples, and facility upkeep

Customer & HR Support

  • Respond to customer enquiries and provide follow-up where needed
  • Assist in HR-related administration such as attendance records and staff files

Requirements

  • At least 1 year admin/project coordination experience (renovation/ID preferred)
  • Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office / Google Workspace
  • Positive working attitude and good communication skills

Why Join Us?


✅ Exposure to renovation project coordination & site operations
✅ Career growth in a dynamic SME

✅ Bonus: Extra allowance if able to work 6 days

📩 How to Apply
Send your resume to hiring@panelcraft.sg or Ryan via WhatsApp [81257108] with subject: Admin & Project Coordinator Application.

postedCompany.description:
Join PanelCraft - Innovative Wall Panel Renovation Services


Are you passionate about transforming living spaces with innovative renovation solutions? Do you want to be part of a dynamic team that is committed to delivering high-quality, sustainable products and services? If so, we invite you to join PanelCraft.


At PanelCraft, we are dedicated to providing homeowners with a revolutionary alternative to traditional wall coverings. Our WPC wall panels are easy to install, eco-friendly, and available in a range of stylish designs to suit any home décor. We take pride in our craftsmanship and attention to detail, and are committed to delivering exceptional customer service at every step of the way.


As we expand our business, we are looking for talented and motivated individuals to join our team. Whether you are a skilled carpenter, a sales and marketing expert, or a customer service professional, we offer a range of opportunities to grow and develop your career.

Benefits of working at PanelCraft:

  • Competitive salaries and benefits packages
  • Opportunities for career advancement and professional development
  • A supportive and collaborative work environment that values teamwork, creativity, and innovation
  • A commitment to sustainability and eco-friendliness in all aspects of our business

If you share our passion for innovation and excellence, we encourage you to apply for our open positions today. Together, we can build a better future for homeowners and the environment.
postedCompany.name: PANELCRAFT PTE. LTD.
